name: Danger & Eggs
overview: Follows the endless adventures of a fearless, teal-haired girl named D.D. Danger and her ever cautious best friend, a giant talking egg named Phillip. Together, join this buddy system as they explore an underground laboratory, meet a tech-savvy raccoon, and find moments of heart in the smallest bite of broccoli.

trailers.title: Danger & Eggs – Official Trailer [HD] | Amazon Kids
